title: ruehssia callosa
intro: Ruehssia callosa is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to India. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of limonoids and flavonoids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ruehssia callosa include its potential to lower blood pressure, prevent cancer, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Ruehssia callosa are made into decoctions, infusions, or extracts and can be used to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
